gxpci_packet_queue_state Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

This describes the Packet Queue unidirectional queue state. More...


Data Fields

uint64_t segment_bus_addr [HOST_PQ_SEGMENT_MAX_NUM]
 Bus addresses of the PA-contiguous segments in host memory.
uint32_t num_segments
 Number of the PA-contiguous segments.
uint32_t segment_size
 Size of a single PA-contiguous segment in bytes.
uint32_t buf_size
 Size of a single packet buffer in bytes.
uint32_t buf_size_order
 Packet buffer size order.
uint32_t cred_mask
 Mask of the ring credits.
uint32_t cred_total
 Total credits of the ring.
int barmem_fd
 File handle for mapping the BAR0 memory.
int barmem_size
 Size of the BAR0 memory mapping.
void * bar_mem
 Mapped address for the BAR0 memory.

Detailed Description

This describes the Packet Queue unidirectional queue state.

Field Documentation

uint64_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::segment_bus_addr[HOST_PQ_SEGMENT_MAX_NUM]

Bus addresses of the PA-contiguous segments in host memory.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::num_segments

Number of the PA-contiguous segments.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::segment_size

Size of a single PA-contiguous segment in bytes.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::buf_size

Size of a single packet buffer in bytes.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::buf_size_order

Packet buffer size order.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::cred_mask

Mask of the ring credits.

uint32_t gxpci_packet_queue_state::cred_total

Total credits of the ring.

int gxpci_packet_queue_state::barmem_fd

File handle for mapping the BAR0 memory.

int gxpci_packet_queue_state::barmem_size

Size of the BAR0 memory mapping.

void* gxpci_packet_queue_state::bar_mem

Mapped address for the BAR0 memory.
